name: Copy Lattice Value
description: Server-side value duplication: reads a value from 'from' and writes it to 'to'. The 'from' argument accepts any resolvable address (hex hash, /a/, /o/, /v/, DID URL, or workspace path); 'to' must be a writable mutable path. Use to snapshot a venue op into your own /o/, cache remote data locally, or branch any workspace value. Reads and writes are subject to standard capability checks. Returns {copied: true} on success.

from.description: Source path. Any resolvable address: hex hash, /a/<hash>, /o/<name>, /v/<path>, DID URL, or workspace path (w/, g/, j/, etc.).

to.description: Destination path. Must be a writable mutable path (o/, w/, g/<own-agent>/, s/, n/, t/).

copied.description: True if the value was successfully copied.
